Product Name: Bauhaus Blend 01 Hand Tufted Wool & Bamboo Silk Rug
Description: Discover the intersection of architectural heritage and tactile luxury. Hand-tufted by master artisans in India, this collection utilizes a premium blend of natural wool and shimmering bamboo silk to create striking dimensional depth. Featuring a bold palette of deep teal, burnt terracotta, sage green, and warm ochre, each rug plays with light and shadow through hand-carved high-low piles and intricate line work. Transform your space into a living gallery.
alt Text: Bauhaus geometric hand-tufted rug in teal, terracotta, and ochre wool and bamboo silk by House of Decor
Image Title / Caption: House of Decor Abstract Geometric Hand-Tufted Rug
Image description: A high-end luxury rug showcasing modern abstract geometry, rich textural depth, and high-low pile carving in an earthen-teal colorway.
